title: FS-011 Agony Mixed Martial Arts 004 Kyoko Maki vs Marin Asakura - Maki Kyoko
description: Following boxing, Kyoko Maki and Marin Asakura face off in mixed martial arts. Fainting only. Strangle again and again until the opponent gives up, and squeeze each time he stands up. When strangled, she faints in agony while drooling. Endure suffering while drooling. Strong-willed women's fight *This work is fully clothed.
